title: BillingAppStripeCreateCheckoutSessionResult
description:
Result of creating a Stripe Checkout Session.

Contains all the information needed to redirect customers to the checkout
or initialize an embedded checkout flow.

customer_id.description: The customer ID in the billing system.
customer_id.title: ULID

setup_intent_id.description: The setup intent ID created for collecting the payment method.

client_secret.description:
Client secret for initializing Stripe.js on the client side.

Required for embedded checkout sessions.
See: https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/custom-success-page

client_reference_id.description:
The client reference ID provided in the request.

Useful for reconciling the session with your internal systems.

customer_email.description: Customer's email address if provided to Stripe.

currency.description: Currency code for the checkout session.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the checkout session was created.
created_at.title: RFC3339 Date-Time

expires_at.description: Timestamp when the checkout session will expire.
expires_at.title: RFC3339 Date-Time

metadata.description: Metadata attached to the checkout session.

status.description:
The status of the checkout session.

See: https://docs.stripe.com/api/checkout/sessions/object#checkout_session_object-status

url.description: URL to redirect customers to the checkout page (for hosted mode).

mode.description:
Mode of the checkout session.

Currently only "setup" mode is supported for collecting payment methods.

cancel_url.description: The cancel URL where customers are redirected if they cancel.

success_url.description: The success URL where customers are redirected after completion.

return_url.description: The return URL for embedded sessions after authentication.
